tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows hypoglycemia with low HbA1c, elevated serum creatinine, metabolic acidosis (low CO₂), and abnormal urinalysis (proteinuria, glycosuria, ketonuria, low specific gravity, brown/cloudy urine). These findings suggest possible acute or chronic kidney dysfunction, impaired glucose metabolism, and possible dehydration or infection. Clinical correlation and further evaluation are recommended.

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
